data.body:
## Description

**What**: Delete doc-writer-agent.md from the repo root.
**Why**: The source prompt spec has been incorporated into the agent definition. Keeping it creates confusion about which file is authoritative.
**Scope**:
- IN: Delete doc-writer-agent.md
- OUT: Everything else

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, doc-writer-agent.md no longer exists in the repo root
  ← Satisfies: "doc-writer-agent.md is deleted from the repo root after all other tasks for the epic are complete"
